specific_mechanism: Prion protein (PrP) propagation: a misfolded PrP^Sc directly contacts a normal PrP^C and converts it to the misfolded conformation by template-directed structural copying. The new PrP^Sc then propagates to more PrP^C. No nucleic acid intermediate; structure-only inheritance. Causes spongiform encephalopathy. Distinct from infection by being template-based protein-to-protein.
llm_application: Model misrepresentation propagation in LLM agent memory as prion-style structural templating: a single misformatted/misrepresented memory entry contacts neighbors during retrieval/generation and templates them to the same misrepresentation. Cumulative propagation has predictable cascade timing (proportional to retrieval frequency × proximity). Detect via density measurement, contain via quarantine or counter-templating.
novelty_claim: Error-cascade in LLM-MAS is heavily studied: 'From Spark to Fire' (2603.04474) directly models error cascades. Memory Poisoning (2601.05504, MemoryGraft 2512.16962, Memory Control Flow Attacks 2603.15125) addresses corruption-by-poisoning. Security of Long-Term Memory survey (2604.16548). Search summary explicitly frames 'shared-memory contamination as social contagion' for LLM agents. The prion-specific template-misfolding-propagation framing isn't directly imported as analogy, but the cascade and propagation mechanisms are heavily covered.
